pricing: WLD/USD Chainlink feed multiplied by scale factor; USDC assumed 1:1 with USD (no quote feed).
notes: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 deployed via official Morpho factory. Single Chainlink WLD/USD feed at 18 decimals, no vaults, no quote feeds, no proxy (immutable). Hardcoded USDC=USD peg means USDC deviation is invisible to the oracle. No staleness or bounds checks in the adapter; relies on Chainlink's own guarantees. L2 environment introduces additional feed-update latency relative to L1.
